title: Piquant Welsh Collards Skillet
description: A salty, velvety Welsh collard dish with a miso marinate, perfect for a crowd-pleasing one-pan dinner.
instructions: Whisk 2 tbsp red miso paste with 2 tbsp water to create a smooth sauce.
Heat 1 tbsp olive oil in a cast-iron skillet over medium heat.
Add 2 minced garlic cloves and 1/2 sliced red onion, sauté until onion is translucent.
Stir in 1 tsp sea salt, 1/2 tsp black pepper and 1/4 tsp red pepper flakes, cooking for 30 seconds.
Add the collard greens to the skillet, tossing to coat them evenly with the aromatics.
Sauté the collards for about 5 minutes, stirring occasionally until they start to wilt.
Pour the miso sauce over the greens, stirring to combine and coat all the leaves.
Reduce heat to low and let the collards simmer for another 5-7 minutes until tender and the sauce thickens.
Taste and adjust seasoning if needed, then serve hot as a flavorful side or main.
